chain-upgrade-token-rebalance-25-feb-202.title: Chain Upgrade - Token Rebalancing - 10 Billion PC Tokens

items.overview-text: Push Chain executed a token rebalancing proposal to reduce the total PC token supply from 75T+ tokens to approximately 10 billion tokens. This upgrade addresses a technical debt from the early days of the testnet and prepares the chain for a mainnet-like environment.
items.why-text: In the early days of Push Chain testnet, there was no burn and mint process for PC tokens. This resulted in extremely low price calculations for universal transactions and allowed a handful of token holders to accumulate massive token supplies (going into trillions). This created an imbalanced token economy that needed correction before mainnet launch.
items.reason-tech-debt: - Remove old technical debt from early testnet
items.reason-token-economy: - Establish a fair and sustainable token economy
items.what-changed-text: The proposal affected the top 1,950 wallets out of 1.178M total addresses. Wallets holding 1,100 PC tokens or more (including those with trillions) were rebalanced to hold between 1,100-2,000 PC tokens.
items.change-supply: - Total supply reduced from 75T+ to ~10B PC tokens
items.change-wallets: - Top 1,950 wallets rebalanced to 1,100-2,000 PC token range
items.change-percentage: - Affects only 0.17% of total addresses (1,950 out of 1.178M)
items.why-not-informed-text: Users were not notified in advance to prevent malicious actors from redistributing tokens to other wallets before the rebalancing. This security measure ensured the integrity of the rebalancing process and prevented gaming of the system.
items.validator-period: The testnet validator proposal period is currently set to 5 minutes to help eliminate edge cases like this before full decentralized validator ownership is implemented.
items.why-52t-text: The rebalance is a two-phase approach. The tokens are now collected to a team-controlled wallet and will be burned soon.
items.affect-majority: **For 99.83% of users:** This change does not affect you. Your wallet balance remains unchanged.
items.affect-top-wallets: **For affected wallets (top 1,950):** If your wallet held 1,100+ PC tokens (or trillions), your balance has been rebalanced to the 1,100-2,000 PC token range.
items.need-help-text: If you believe you are affected by this rebalancing and have questions or concerns, please reach out to the Push Chain team on Discord for assistance.
